title: Part three of the microphysics names cleanup

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
The ClimaAtmos downstream tests in upstream repos are failing because `Glib_jll` is in `known_dependencies` but not in `direct_dependencies`, since it isn't in the ClimaAtmos Project.

This PR adds it to the ClimaAtmos project and removes the lines adding it to each GHA workflow. This should make CI pass for both ClimaAtmos and upstream packages.

title: add Glib_jll to deps
